subtitle: A 17-kilometre arc of white coral sand south of Mombasa where two monsoons run a year-round kite engine, rope bridges carry endangered colobus monkeys over the beach road, and a 16th-century coral-rag mosque still holds Friday prayers.
spike_statement: Diani is a reef-walled lagoon worked by two opposite monsoons, with rope bridges over the road for endangered colobus and a 16th-century mosque on the sand.
